title: Pride (In the Name of Love)
why_this_song: Pride (In the Name of Love) by U2 (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "One man come in the name of love"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Nobody like you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "name" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "name" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "nobody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "nobody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: One man come in the name of love
One man washed on an empty beach
Shot rings out in the Memphis sky

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Free at last, they took your life

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Pride (In the Name of Love)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Pride (In the Name of Love)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Pride (In the Name of Love)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Pride (In the Name of Love)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Pride (In the Name of Love)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Pride (In the Name of Love)", o que aconteceria?
